top_signals.title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure. Patrick McHenry, former Republican Congressman from North Carolina, Bloomberg Contributor, former House Financial Services Committee Chairman joins to discuss Trump's financial disclosures as well as Speaker Johnson sending the House on recess.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Blackstone Offloads Stakes in Trio of Virginia Data Centers
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Blackstone  is selling its stakes in a trio of data centers across Northern Virginia for $3.5 billion, cashing out of part of a bet it made less than three years ago. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
